name: Prayosha Hospital
tagline: Compassionate Care, Advanced Technology in Padra.
subTagline: Your trusted 24/7 ICU and Multispeciality Trauma Center

address.full: 3rd & 4th Floor, City Center, Jashpur Chokdi, Jambusar Padra Rd, Padra, Vadodara, Gujarat - 391440

departments.name: ICU & Trauma Care
departments.description: Round-the-clock intensive care with state-of-the-art monitoring systems and a dedicated trauma response team.

departments.name: General Medicine
departments.description: Comprehensive internal medicine services covering diagnostics, treatment, and preventive care for all age groups.

departments.name: Ambulance Service
departments.description: Fully-equipped emergency ambulance service ensuring rapid patient transport across the Padra region.

facilities.name: Modular Operation Theatres
facilities.description: Laminar air-flow modular OTs with cutting-edge surgical instruments for safe procedures.

facilities.name: Ventilator Support
facilities.description: Advanced ICU ventilators for critical respiratory management and post-operative care.

facilities.name: 24-Hour Pharmacy
facilities.description: In-house pharmacy stocked with essential and specialty medicines, open round the clock.

facilities.name: Advanced Sterilization (CSSD)
facilities.description: Central Sterile Supply Department ensuring highest standards of instrument sterilization and infection control.

about.title: About Prayosha Hospital
paragraphs: Prayosha Multispeciality Hospital is Padra's premier healthcare facility, committed to delivering world-class medical services at affordable rates. Our state-of-the-art infrastructure and experienced medical team ensure that every patient receives personalized, compassionate care.

We maintain the highest standards of cleanliness and hygiene across every department — from our modular operation theatres to the ICU and patient wards. Our mission is to make quality multispecialty healthcare accessible to every family in the region.
